ToShowDoc CLI Tool

Usage: ToShowDoc [options] [command]

Options:
  -h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  add        add project
  del        delete project
  list       show all project
  sync       sync doc

Run 'ToShowDoc [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
add project

Usage: ToShowDoc add [options]

Options:
  -h|--help             Show help information
  -n|--name             Project Name
  -ak|--ApiKey          ShowDoc Project ApiKey
  -at|--ApiToken        ShowDoc Project ApiToken
  -su|--SwaggerJsonUrl  Swagger Json Url
  -sdu|--ShowDocUrl     ShowDocUrl Name
